# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

Prevent linkerd policy default allow.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default deny-all authorization policy for service mesh"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 0-65535
  proxyProtocol: unknown
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: deny-all-unauthenticated
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Deny all unauthenticated traffic by default"
spec:
  server:
    name: default-deny-all
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-policy
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default authorization policy denying all traffic without explicit rules"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-deny-all
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authentication
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authentication
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Require mTLS identity for service-to-service communication"
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: Namespace
      name: default
      group: ""
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-linkerd-probes
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allow Linkerd health check probes"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-deny-all
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-probe-authn
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: linkerd-probe-authn
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Authenticate Linkerd probe traffic from localhost"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: "0.0.0.0/0"
      except:
        - "0.0.0.0/0"
    - cidr: "127.0.0.1/32"
